backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features (animated hack progress bar and typewriter terminal output) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining light and dark OKLCH CSS custom properties for the shadcn-ui design token system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Fake Hacker' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component managing tab-based navigation between Terminal, Scanner, and Profile pages, with a CRT scanline overlay and a caffeine.ai attribution footer.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Bottom navigation bar component with Terminal, Scanner, and Profile tabs styled with terminal-green active indicators and glow effects.
Animated terminal-themed progress bar component that displays multi-stage hack progress with status icons, a shimmer fill bar, and a success/failure completion message.
frontend/src/components/MatrixRain.tsx: Canvas-based component rendering a matrix rain animation with falling Japanese and hex characters in terminal green, used as a background effect.
Fixed full-screen overlay providing CRT scanline texture, an animated moving scan line, and a vignette effect layered over the entire app.
frontend/src/components/TypewriterOutput: React component that renders text lines with a character-by-character typewriter animation using the useTypewriter hook, including a blinking cursor during animation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommandProcessor.t: Defines a map of hacker-themed terminal commands (help, scan, trace, decrypt, exploit, etc.) that each append styled output lines, with the 'hack' command handled externally via a returned hackTarget flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useFakeScan.ts: Simulates a network vulnerability scan by progressively revealing randomly generated fake scan results with animated progress and phase labels over a timed sequence.
frontend/src/hooks/useHackProgress.ts: Manages a multi-stage hacking animation with smooth progress tracking, cycling through predefined exploit stages and resolving with an 85% success rate, invoking a completion callback with the result.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useTerminalScript.ts: Plays back a scripted hacker-themed boot sequence by appending timestamped terminal lines with cumulative delays, then signals when booting is complete and exposes an addLine helper.
frontend/src/hooks/useTypewriter.ts: Animates an array of strings character-by-character with configurable per-character and per-line delays, exposing the partially revealed lines and a completion flag.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a dark terminal/hacker theme using oklch colors, imports Share Tech Mono font, defines CSS custom properties, and includes animations like blink, glitch, flicker, and CRT scanlines.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Static profile page displaying a fictional hacker's alias, rank, stats, skill bars, and operation history with a terminal/hacker aesthetic.
frontend/src/pages/Scanner.tsx: Network scanner page that uses a useFakeScan hook to simulate a vulnerability assessment, displaying scan progress and results with colored status and severity badges.
frontend/src/pages/Terminal.tsx: Interactive terminal page that processes user commands, animates output with a typewriter effect via a queue system, and renders a hack progress bar UI when the 'hack' command is entered.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with terminal-themed colors, monospace fonts, custom box shadows, and keyframe animations for the hacker app aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing the hacking app, its existing features (animated hack progress bar and typewriter terminal output), and versioning info.
